title: Fermented Irish Chicken Drumsticks Skewers
description: Tender and flavorful skewers of chicken drumsticks marinated in a fermented Irish-inspired mixture, perfect for a post-workout meal. This recipe combines the snappy texture of fermented vegetables with the richness of caramelized onions and the freshness of parsley.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together sour cream, apple cider vinegar, Dijon mustard, thyme, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add chopped onion and carrots to the bowl and mix well.
Add the chicken drumsticks to the bowl and coat them evenly with the marinade.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Thread 4-5 chicken drumsticks onto each skewer, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 12-15 minutes per side, or until the chicken is cooked through and caramelized.
Brush the skewers with honey during the last 2 minutes of grilling.
Serve the skewers garnished with chopped parsley and additional caramelized onions if desired.
